====Pokémon====
{{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}}
This listing is of Viola's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Viola
|pkmn=Surskit
|type1=Bug
|type2=Water
|img=Viola Surskit.png
|epnum=XY005
|epname=A Blustery Santalune Gym Battle!
|vajp=
|vaen=Eileen Stevens
|desc={{p|Surskit}} is Viola's first known Pokémon. It was first used against [[Ash's Pikachu]] in their first Gym battle. Surskit defeated Pikachu by freezing the battlefield with Ice Beam, which prevented him from moving properly and left him unable to escape Surskit's Signal Beam. Next, it fought {{AP|Fletchling}}, who quickly defeated Surskit due to its ability to fly. In ''[[XY006|Battling on Thin Ice!]]'', Surskit battled Pikachu again in a rematch, where its previous tactics failed due to Pikachu using his tail to balance himself on the ice. It was eventually defeated by Pikachu's {{m|Thunderbolt}}.

Surskit reappeared in ''[[XY020|Breaking Titles at the Chateau!]]'', where it battled [[Grant]]'s {{p|Onix}} but lost.

It appeared in flashbacks in ''[[XY021|A PokeVision of Things to Come!]]'' and ''[[XY023|Coming Back into the Cold]]''.

Surskit's known moves are {{m|Protect}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, {{m|Signal Beam}}, {{m|Sticky Web}}, and {{m|Bubble Beam}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Viola
|pkmn=Vivillon
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Viola Vivillon.png
|epnum=XY005
|epname=A Blustery Santalune Gym Battle!
|vajp=Aya Endō
|vaen=Eileen Stevens
|desc={{p|Vivillon}} is Viola's second known Pokémon. It was first used against Ash in their first Gym battle. It was sent out to battle {{AP|Fletchling}} after it defeated Surskit. It won the battle by using Psychic to trap Fletchling in Surskit's {{m|Sticky Web}}, leaving it defenseless to Vivillon's Solar Beam. In ''[[XY006|Battling on Thin Ice!]]'', Vivillon faced Fletchling again in a rematch, where it beat Fletchling again by hitting it with Sleep Powder, leaving it defenseless to Solar Beam once more. Then it fought {{AP|Pikachu}}, where Vivillon was defeated after its wing was frozen by the ice surrounding the Gym, hindering its ability to fly and leaving it an easy target for Pikachu's {{m|Thunderbolt}}.

It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY012|To Catch a Pokemon Smuggler!]]''.

It appeared again in ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', where it helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]].

It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''.

Vivillon's known moves are {{m|Psychic}}, {{m|Gust}}, {{m|Solar Beam}}, and {{m|Sleep Powder}}.}}
